qa_pairs.question: How can a user ensure their network traffic is protected when connecting their personal computer to public Wi-Fi spots?
qa_pairs.answer: A user can ensure their network traffic is well protected by using a trustworthy VPN connection when connecting to public Wi-Fi spots.

qa_pairs.question: What additional resources are available for users who protect their public Wi-Fi connections with a VPN?
qa_pairs.answer: Users may refer to the 'Public Wi-Fi' resource (at getcybersafe.gc.ca) for other tips on using public Wi-Fi spots.

qa_pairs.question: What is a recommended practice for users who wish to avoid insecure Wi-Fi spots?
qa_pairs.answer: It is a good practice to avoid connecting your personal computer to public Wi-Fi spots that may not be secure.

qa_pairs.question: What is the security posture of network traffic when a trustworthy VPN solution is employed for public Wi-Fi connections?
qa_pairs.answer: When a trustworthy VPN solution is employed for public Wi-Fi connections, your network traffic is well protected.

qa_pairs.question: What is the advice for someone who chooses not to connect their personal computer to public Wi-Fi spots at all?
qa_pairs.answer: It is a good practice to avoid connecting Wi-Fi spots that may not be secure.
